title: Collaboration and Pull Requests Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Git collaboration and PR concepts.

questions.question: What is 'Forking' in the context of Git and platforms like GitHub?
options: To create a copy of a project to make changes to without affecting the original

questions.question: Regarding Git collaboration, what is a 'Pull Request' used for?
options: To submit your changes for review and inclusion in an original project from a forked or branched version
To set up a local Git server

questions.question: Which of these is the primary role of a project maintainer when it comes to pull requests?
options: To review and potentially merge new code contributions
To start the development from scratch

questions.question: A situation where two or more transactions are waiting for each other to release a lock, resulting in a hang, is called a _______.
